name: player cpoe from plays range year_offset pools numerator/denominator over the window (executed-result parity)
description: Seed pass plays with cpoe across 2024 (2.0, 4.0) and 2025 (6.0), then run player_completion_percentage_over_expected_from_plays with year=[2023] + year_offset=[1,2]. CPOE is a per-dropback mean, so the range pools SUM(cpoe)/SUM(qualifying dropbacks) over the offset window = 12.0/3 = 4.0 -- NOT the 2024-only mean (6.0/2 = 3.0). Proves the numerator/denominator recombination spans both offset years rather than collapsing to one.
expected_query: with "t4d043ca740216658fcf7143d5502657f" as materialized (select COALESCE(psr_pid) as pid, SUM(cpoe) as pass_comp_pct_over_expected_from_plays_numerator, SUM(CASE WHEN cpoe IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as pass_comp_pct_over_expected_from_plays_denominator from "nfl_plays" where not "play_type" = 'NOPL' and "nfl_plays"."seas_type" in ('REG') and "nfl_plays"."year" in (2024, 2025) group by COALESCE(psr_pid)) select "player"."pid", player.fname, player.lname, (SELECT SUM(t4d043ca740216658fcf7143d5502657f.pass_comp_pct_over_expected_from_plays_numerator) / NULLIF(SUM(t4d043ca740216658fcf7143d5502657f.pass_comp_pct_over_expected_from_plays_denominator), 0) FROM t4d043ca740216658fcf7143d5502657f WHERE t4d043ca740216658fcf7143d5502657f.pid = player.pid) AS "pass_comp_pct_over_expected_from_plays_0", "player"."pos" from "player" where player.pos IN ('ZZ') group by player.fname, player.lname, "player"."pid", "player"."lname", "player"."fname", "player"."pos" order by "player"."pid" asc limit 500

seed: INSERT INTO player (pid, fname, lname, pname, formatted, pos, pos1, dob, nfl_draft_year) VALUES ('TEST-CPOE-2000-2000-01-01', 'Test', 'Cpoe', 'T.Cpoe', 'Test Cpoe', 'ZZ', 'ZZ', '2000-01-01', 2020)
INSERT INTO nfl_plays (esbid, "playId", year, week, updated, seas_type, play_type, psr_pid, cpoe) VALUES (990001, 1, 2024, 1, 0, 'REG', 'PASS', 'TEST-CPOE-2000-2000-01-01', 2.0)
INSERT INTO nfl_plays (esbid, "playId", year, week, updated, seas_type, play_type, psr_pid, cpoe) VALUES (990001, 2, 2024, 1, 0, 'REG', 'PASS', 'TEST-CPOE-2000-2000-01-01', 4.0)
INSERT INTO nfl_plays (esbid, "playId", year, week, updated, seas_type, play_type, psr_pid, cpoe) VALUES (990002, 1, 2025, 1, 0, 'REG', 'PASS', 'TEST-CPOE-2000-2000-01-01', 6.0)
result_equivalence.reference_sql: SELECT SUM(cpoe) / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN cpoe IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS pass_comp_pct_over_expected_from_plays_0 FROM nfl_plays WHERE psr_pid = 'TEST-CPOE-2000-2000-01-01' AND year IN (2024, 2025) AND seas_type = 'REG' AND play_type <> 'NOPL'
